title: 私、もっとけっぱります！

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Rice, Tickezo! Sorry to keep you waiting! I wonder
what we should have for lunch toda—

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
The morning session went great, so let's make
sure we keep it up this afternoon too! Time t'seize
the day!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Noth'n to it but t'do it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hm? That accent... I wonder if they're from
Hokkaido too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Umm, I think they might just be your fans, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You've been doing so well in your races lately
that a lot of people have started copying you. It's
'cause they wanna be just like you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Really? Th-then... I'm happy to hear that.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Seconds, please! And an extra-large serving at
that! I want as much as Spe usually has!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Everyone has the same hairstyle as you,
Spe! Your popularity has really spread!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, they really do! They must look up to me a
lot...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(I've gotta train harder and continue to improve
myself so that I can meet everyone's
expectations. Time t'buckle down an' do this!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! I can still keep going! One more lap!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
One more bowl! Another plate! Keep that food
coming!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Spe's really been putting the pedal to the metal
lately! She's been running and eating a whole lot!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: She has, but... I'm a little worried about her.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff! Wheeze! Weird... I've been training a ton, but my body... feels so heavy...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So... tired...

text_block_list.name: Rice & Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Spe!
You okay?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! I was so scared when you suddenly
collapsed like that!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was shocked too... Now that you've changed out
of your tracksuit, I think we should call it a day
and return to the dorm—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Spe?! What's with all that food?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Since I can't run, I thought I'd eat instead. My
weight has gone up recently, but as long as I can
turn it into muscle, all will be right as rain!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, Spe! You're going to do more damage
than good by eating so much!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
She's right! Hayahide said you gotta eat and
exercise in moderation to achieve... Uh, a perfect
body or something like that!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: B-but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna hear any if, ands, or Derbys about
it! If you push yourself too hard and faint again,
we'll... we'll... Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Tickezo... I'm sorry. I was just so happy to be
recognized and admired by so many people...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was supposed to be working even harder than
ever to meet everyone's expectations, but I just
made a big mess out of everything...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That's not true!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You're always earnest, and you never let failures
get you down. Just watching you lifts my spirits!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! And the way you keep charging straight
toward your dream inspires me to work just as
hard as you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
What we're trying to say is, you don't need to
overthink things or push yourself so hard! You're
wonderful enough as you are now!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! You're incredible! And I love, love,
looooove you just the way you are!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Rice, Tickezo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're right. People like me for me, so I should
stick to the things that have worked to this point!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I pushed my body and stomach way beyond
their limits, so I should start by getting myself
back into tip-top form!
